scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:customer" "npm run dev:driver"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w apps/customer-app && npm run build -w apps/driver-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/customer-app && npm run typecheck -w apps/driver-app
